info.title: Onshape API - Item
info.description: Manage non-geometric [items](https://cad.onshape.com/help/Content/Plans/items.htm). (Professional, Educator, and Enterprise accounts only.)

tags.name: Item
tags.description: Manage non-geometric [items](https://cad.onshape.com/help/Content/Plans/items.htm). (Professional, Educator, and Enterprise accounts only.)

get.summary: Get all items owned by a company/classroom/enterprise.
get.description:
Returns a list of all items owned by the company/classroom/enterprise. 
 
Either `documentId` or `companyId` must be provided.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: ID of any document owned by the company/classroom/enterprise.

parameters.name: publishStates
parameters.description: Refine returned items by publish states: `0: PENDING | 1: ACTIVE | 2: INACTIVE`

parameters.name: classification
parameters.description: Refine returned items by classification. Classifications are managed in company/classroom/enterprise [Properties settings](https://cad.onshape.com/help/Content/Plans/items.htm#item-class).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of entries to skip in the returned list.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of list entries to return in a single API call.

get.description: Either `documentId` or `companyId` must be provided, in addition to the item ID.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: ID of any document owned by the company/classroom/enterprise.

parameters.name: iid
parameters.description: ID of the item to update.

delete.description: Items can only be deleted if `publishState = 0` (`PENDING`). [`GET /items/{iid}`](#/Items/getItem) to get the `publishState`.

parameters.name: iid
parameters.description: ID of the item to delete.

href.description: URI for current page of resources.

items.description: Array of items in the current page.

next.description: URI for next page of the resources if more are available.

previous.description: URI for previous page of the resources.

BTListResponseBTItemInfo.description: A list of resources that typically supports paging.

companyId.description: ID of the company, classroom, or enterprise that owns this item.
ID of the company, classroom, or enterprise that owns this item.

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

additionalProperties.description: Map of the item's properties and their values.

properties.description: Map of the item's properties and their values.

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.
